title: Looking for Category Manager at Porter

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Porter
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
